name: Italian Parmesan Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the grill.
2. Cut a 14 inch square sheet of heavy duty foil.
3. Place potatoes in the center.
4. In a small bowl, combine the oil and all seasonings.
5. Drizzle over potatoes; stir gently to coat.
6. Wrap and seal securely with tight double folds.
7. Place foil packet on gas grill over medium heat or on charcoal grill 4-6 inches from medium-high heat.
8. Cook for 30-40 minutes, or until tender. Open the packet; stir gently.
9. Sprinkle with cheese. Return to grill and cook an additional 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted. Serve immediately.
Oven Directions:
1. Heat oven to 450°F.
2. Prepare potatoes in foil packet as described above.
3. Bake for 40-50 minutes, or until potatoes are tender. Open and stir gently; sprinkle with cheese.
4. Return to oven and bake an additional 3-5 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
